title: OSPF: R30 Process 100, Router-ID Loopback0, Network Statements, /18 Summary (Area 50)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
Do not remove any existing configurations from the devices.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: OSPF is preconfigured on all devices except R30. Configure R30 to complete these tasks.
Task 1: Configure OSPF according to the topology: (1) Use Process ID 100. (2) Use Loopback0 for the Router ID. (3) Advertise all networks into OSPF — USE network statements under the OSPF process.
Task 2: Configure a /18 summary route for Area 50.
hints: R30'de 'show run int lo0' ile Loopback0 adresini doğrula (10.30.0.1 bekleniyor); router-id bu adres olmalı.
Bu item network statement İSTER: 'network <ağ> <wildcard> area X' (Lo0 ve e0/0/e0/1 Area 0, e0/2 10.50.40.0 Area 50).
answer_key_raw:
R30:
R30> enable
R30# configure terminal
R30(config)# router ospf 100
R30(config-router)# router-id 10.30.0.1
R30(config-router)# network 10.30.0.1 0.0.0.0 area 0
R30(config-router)# network 10.10.30.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
R30(config-router)# network 10.20.30.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
R30(config-router)# network 10.50.40.0 0.0.0.255 area 50
R30(config-router)# area 50 range 10.50.0.0 255.255.192.0
R30(config-router)# end
R30# write
explanation: Item 25/28 ailesinin network-statement varyantı (R30, Process 100, Loopback0, /18): OSPF geleneksel 'network' cümleleriyle açılır (Lo0 10.30.0.1/32, e0/1 10.10.30.0/24, e0/0 10.20.30.0/24 Area 0; e0/2 10.50.40.0/24 Area 50). Router-id = Loopback0 (10.30.0.1). /18 özet (255.255.192.0) ABR'de 'area 50 range 10.50.0.0 255.255.192.0' ile.
